title: Too Little, Too Late? Rebel AAP MPs Ignored Kejriwal’s Damage Control Meet, Dumped Party Despite Ticket Promise
description: The Aam Aadmi Party faces a significant crisis after Raghav Chadha and six Rajya Sabha MPs defected to the BJP. Despite Arvind Kejriwal's attempts for reconciliation, the MPs rejected his outreach. The party is in panic mode, strategizing post-defection and assessing impacts from this setback.
